summary:
The provided literature does not indicate any link between ESN364 and the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal (HPG) axis; all referenced studies focus solely on thyroid-related endocrinology, including only peripheral mentions of the pituitary without reference to reproductive function or gonadotropins. There is therefore no evidence supporting ESN364’s ability to activate the HPG axis. 

Final Answer: \boxed{B}

Based on available data, ESN364 has no documented effect on the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal (HPG) axis because existing studies focus exclusively on thyroid physiology and do not report interactions with gonadotropin-releasing hormone or fertility mechanisms. Consequently, it cannot be concluded that ESN364 activates the HPG axis.  

Final answer: $\boxed{\text{B}}$
